$comment: Structured-output schema passed to Claude Sonnet 4.6 via output_config.format (type json_schema). Server re-validates with Zod and computes annotation offsets (research R3, R8, R9).

zeroReason.description: Non-null only when an official ENEM zero condition applies; when set, all scores must be 0 (FR-013).

justification.description: One short paragraph, in Brazilian Portuguese, citing the rubric level descriptor that matches.

generalFeedback.description: Overall strengths and highest-impact improvement areas, Brazilian Portuguese (FR-012).

annotations.description: Inline corrections anchored to the text. At least 3 when text quality allows (SC-005); may be empty only for zero-scored essays.

excerpt.description: VERBATIM substring copied character-for-character from the essay text. The server locates it to compute highlight offsets (R8).

issue.description: What is wrong in this passage.
